response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies are not adapted to the changes in pressure and oxygen levels underwater  
their immune systems are not designed to handle the unique environmental conditions of aquatic environments  
the body's ability to manage stress and maintain homeostasis is compromised in underwater settings  
the lack of proper oxygen supply and the presence of saltwater can lead to serious health issues  

Sec. 2  
the physical and chemical properties of water differ significantly from air  
the body's natural mechanisms for breathing and regulating blood pressure are not suited for underwater conditions  
the absence of a clear air supply and the presence of dissolved salts can disrupt normal physiological functions  
the inability to adapt to the underwater environment can lead to life-threatening complications
